programmes.show_description: OJ is live from Salford, asking about your Anecd-idn'ts, the things that never happened in your life but you've daydreamed about them, wished them to be true.

programmes.show_description: Dermot celebrates the music of Oxford in the 90s from the likes of Supergrass, Radiohead and Ride. Also, Danny from Embrace picks his AA side.

programmes.show_name: The Country Show with Bob Harris
